_comment: 在旧模型中增加新音色的示例 / Example: add a new voice to an existing model

experiment._comment: languages 及顺序必须与旧模型一致；使用新 name 保留旧模型 / Keep languages and order identical; use a new name to preserve the old model
experiment.name: model_1_voice02

initialization._comment: expand_speakers 保留旧权重并扩展 speaker embedding / expand_speakers preserves old weights and expands the speaker embedding

generation._comment: include_metadata 合并旧音色样本，降低灾难性遗忘 / include_metadata merges old-voice samples to reduce catastrophic forgetting

voice._comment: 新 speaker 名称不能与旧 speaker 重复 / The new speaker name must not duplicate an existing speaker
voice.speaker: voice_02
voice.prompt: A clear, confident adult voice that is distinct from voice_01, with natural pacing and neutral emotion.
voice.reference_text: Hello, this reference creates the second multilingual speaker.

training._comment: 扩音色使用较小学习率进行微调 / Fine-tune added voices with a smaller learning rate
